orbik.blurb: Icomply installs, tests and maintains Orbik emergency lighting across Stockport, Manchester and the wider North West, from LED bulkheads and exit signage through to conversion modules and duration testing. Our engineers work to BS 5266 with full certification so commercial premises and residential blocks stay audit-ready. Trade Orbik fittings, batteries and legends are available from our North West trade shop for landlords, electrical contractors and FM teams.

p4-limited.blurb: Icomply supplies and commissions P4 Limited emergency lighting for offices, industrial units and residential estates throughout the North West. Electrical contractors and FM teams can order P4 bulkheads, exit signs and battery packs from our Stockport-based trade shop serving Manchester, Lancashire and Merseyside.
